creator: majo-bugs.freebsd.org@cerny.sk
text:
The build has failed on other mashine for me now. First re-run failed as well. Second re-run worked:

# cd /usr/ports/www/rubygem-selenium-webdriver/
root@portbuild:/usr/ports/www/rubygem-selenium-webdriver # make install
